designSystem.style: Duotone graphic — bold color blocks, strong typographic hierarchy, minimal decoration. Deep teal and burnt orange as primary duotone pair with electric indigo as tertiary accent. Off-white and charcoal base. No glassmorphism; relies on borders, color-coded left-borders, and typographic weight for structure.

screenDescriptions.home: Dashboard with daily challenge horizontal scroll, stat row, and recent weaves list
screenDescriptions.library: Stem library with category filter horizontal scroll + stacked per-discipline horizontal scroll rows
screenDescriptions.weave: Composition canvas — stem chain with connectors, annotation area, and AI assistant suggestion panel
screenDescriptions.community: Social feed with featured weaves horizontal scroll, trending topics horizontal scroll, and activity list
screenDescriptions.graph: SVG knowledge graph with mastery rings, interactive node selection, stat cards, and mastery breakdown list

features: Interactive SVG knowledge graph with mastery rings
Stem type badge system (fact, principle, metaphor, quote, event, pattern, concept)
